name: Malmstrom AFB
profile: Military-friendly Malmstrom AFB housing snapshot anchored to Great Falls / Cascade County, built for PCSUnited base-level market overviews.

market_metrics.market_type_summary: Steady demand with limited local inventory.

mortgage_assumptions.defaults_note: Based on March 2026 Montana VA loan rates.

notes: Property taxes and insurance materially affect true monthly ownership cost near Malmstrom.
Insurance and HOA should be included in all-in housing cost comparisons.

avg_home_mortgage_monthly.notes: VA loan estimate including P&I and moderate Montana property taxes

crime_status.installation: High security; restricted access. Extremely safe gated military community.
crime_status.metro_great_falls: Great Falls is generally safe; property crime is the primary concern in the city center. Upper North Side is preferred.

school_quality.off_base: Great Falls Public Schools; families often prefer schools on the North Side near the base.

rental_vacancy.notes: Very low; high demand for quality off-base rentals.

rental_metrics.notes: Very low; high demand for quality off-base rentals.

military_lifestyle_fit.description: Critical ICBM mission; tight-knit 'Big Sky' community with unmatched outdoor recreation.

financial_brief.affordability_summary: Stable prices and no state sales tax help maintain high purchasing power.
financial_brief.buyer_opportunity: North Great Falls offers the best combination of safety and proximity to the gate.

market_bluf.bluf_summary: Steady demand with limited inventory ensures long-term market resilience.

summary_points: Malmstrom Air Force Base sits in the Great Falls / Cascade County housing market with base-specific affordability, commute, and neighborhood tradeoffs.
Current market trend is approximately 1.2% year-over-year, which should shape buyer leverage and pricing discipline.
Stable prices and no state sales tax help maintain high purchasing power.
Neighborhood quality varies across Great Falls, Black Eagle, Sun River corridor and other nearby corridors — citywide averages should not be the only filter.
Steady demand with limited inventory ensures long-term market resilience.
opportunities: Malmstrom military demand can support durable housing relevance for disciplined buyers and landlords.
Local inventory and pricing may offer opportunity for households that stress-test taxes, insurance, and commute together.
Great Falls and nearby corridors may offer stronger family or value positioning depending on assignment length.
Assignment-length clarity can improve rent-versus-buy decisions near Malmstrom.
risks: Neighborhood quality, schools, commute, and monthly carrying costs vary across the Great Falls / Cascade County market.
Property taxes, insurance, HOA, and utilities can widen the gap between list price and true monthly payment.
Market averages can hide weak submarkets — property-level review matters.
Stretching beyond a safe housing ratio can reduce PCS flexibility.
buyer_notes: Malmstrom buyers should compare all-in monthly cost, not just principal and interest.
Verify school zones, commute timing, and BAH fit by exact address before signing.
North Great Falls offers the best combination of safety and proximity to the gate.
This market rewards disciplined buyers who test the commute during expected report hours.
seller_notes: Sellers should price against current inventory and days on market rather than older peak assumptions.
Move-in-ready presentation and realistic pricing matter when buyers have leverage.
Military-adjacent commute convenience can be a listing strength if framed clearly.
investor_angles: Military turnover near Malmstrom can support rental demand, but vacancy and maintenance should be modeled conservatively.
Investors should underwrite taxes, insurance, HOA, and property condition — not just acquisition price.
Practical commute corridors often outperform generic metro averages for military renter demand.
buyer_guidance: Use all-in monthly payment as the primary screen.
Compare taxes, insurance, commute, school quality, and resale flexibility before locking a neighborhood.
Do not choose housing based only on distance to Malmstrom.
A slightly lower purchase price can materially improve monthly PCS flexibility.
seller_guidance: Price against active inventory and days on market.
Condition and presentation matter when buyers can compare more options.
Military commute convenience can help positioning if described accurately.
landlord_notes: Military renter demand can improve occupancy durability near Malmstrom.
Model vacancy, repairs, insurance, and turnover conservatively.
Stable spread matters more than headline affordability alone.

market.market_type_summary: Steady demand with limited local inventory.

base_profile.host_or_major_command: 341st Missile Wing / Air Force Global Strike Command
base_profile.primary_mission_summary: Malmstrom AFB supports nuclear deterrence and ICBM mission operations across Montana with a tight-knit Big Sky community and limited housing inventory.
base_profile.pcs_personality: Critical ICBM mission; tight-knit 'Big Sky' community with unmatched outdoor recreation.
base_profile.base_bluf: Steady demand with limited inventory ensures long-term market resilience.

user_positioning.military_family_bluf: Prioritize school-zone verification, BAH fit, commute testing, childcare access, and total monthly housing cost before signing near Malmstrom.
user_positioning.single_airman_bluf: Prioritize commute simplicity, affordability, rental flexibility, and access to daily services around Great Falls.
user_positioning.realtor_bluf: Lead with BAH realism, commute risk, school-zone confidence, and all-in payment math for Malmstrom clients — not generic Great Falls / Cascade County stats alone.
user_positioning.investor_bluf: Rental demand near Malmstrom is influenced by PCS turnover, training/permanent-party mix, and practical commute corridors.

gate_selection_logic: Start with the user's likely duty location.
Identify the most realistic primary gate.
Compare the commute during the user's actual report window.
Do not choose a neighborhood based only on mileage.
commute_intelligence.user_instruction: Before signing a lease or contract, test the commute from the exact property address to the expected gate during the same time window you would normally report to work.

bah_market_reality.bah_bluf: Malmstrom housing decisions should compare BAH against rent, mortgage, utilities, debt, and commute. BAH is a decision filter, not a promise of affordability.
recommended_calculations: BAH with dependents vs estimated rent
BAH without dependents vs estimated rent
Total housing cost vs 30% income lane
Residual monthly income after expenses and housing
bah_market_reality.base_tab_message: Show BAH as a decision filter for Malmstrom, not a promise of affordability. Push users into PCSUnited financial calculators when the housing gap looks tight.

family_readiness.family_bluf: Families PCSing to Malmstrom should verify school zones, childcare options, medical access, commute reality, and housing availability before choosing a neighborhood.

family_readiness.spouse_employment_note: The broader Great Falls / Cascade County metro may offer spouse employment options, but commute, childcare, and credentialing should be considered together.

Tour properties before committing when possible.
first_30_days: Finalize housing only after comparing commute, BAH fit, school zones, and total monthly cost.
Save emergency, medical, gate, and housing office contact information.
Update PCSUnited profile and financial readiness dashboard with final housing numbers.

base_profile.disclaimer: PCSUnited is not an official DoD source. This Base tab is intended for public-facing PCS orientation, housing research, and relocation planning. Users should verify gate hours, access requirements, medical services, housing availability, school zones, and official procedures directly with the installation or official service provider before travel, lease signing, or home purchase.

parser_notes: This Malmstrom AFB file was upgraded to the Lackland-style PCSUnited schema with slug, name, state_code, profile, market_metrics, metrics, ownership_costs, costs, rental_metrics, summary_points, risks, opportunities, buyer_notes, seller_notes, investor_angles, and guidance arrays.
Great Falls / Cascade County is preserved as the surrounding metro/submarket context; base-specific market data was retained.
property_tax_rate and insurance_rate are normalized to decimal form for deterministic math, with percent aliases preserved for display compatibility.

This file now includes base_profile for the PCSUnited Base tab, including gate orientation, visitor control center, major services, on-base housing, recommended nearby neighborhoods, commute intelligence, BAH market guidance, PCS watchouts, and source notes.
